mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `screen_rental_order` ( order_no, equipment_id, shop_id, shop_name, business_circle_id, business_circle_name, total_amount, order_time, user_id, phone, nick_name, display_type, display_target_id, status, remark, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{data.orderNo}, #{data.equipmentId}, #{data.shopId}, #{data.shopName}, #{data.businessCircleId}, #{data.businessCircleName}, #{data.totalAmount}, #{data.orderTime}, #{data.userId}, #{data.phone}, #{data.nickName}, #{data.displayType}, #{data.displayTargetId}, #{data.status}, #{data.remark}, #{data.createTime}, #{data.updateTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT shop_id FROM `screen_rental_order` WHERE equipment_id = #{equipmentId} AND status = 2
